subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! This is the Day whereon all the divine Books have been adorned with His mention, and all the Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی امروز روزی است که جمیع کتب الهی بذکر او مزین شده و جمیع رسل
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prophecy and fulfillment
